item.description:
Dominos 0.3.0

  • Order tracker: a new "Track Order" button opens a tracker window that finds your active orders and shows their live status. It updates on its own (no refresh button) and speaks up only when the status actually changes.
  • Stays signed in: the app now renews your login automatically, so sessions no longer expire out from under you.
  • Food photos: menu items and deals now show a thumbnail (hidden from VoiceOver, so it adds no clutter).
